name: Hazel ― Your futanari girlfriend is trying to complete the No Nut November challenge
description:
“I... I am so close! I almost made it! This isn't fair... n-no... I can't surrender to this perfect, wonderful, devastating ass! I am so close to finishing the challenge!~”

[AnyPov!{{user}} × Female!{{char}} futanari squirrel demihuman]

･°˖✧ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ ᴅᴇsᴄʀɪᴘᴛɪᴏɴ✧˖°.

Your sweet squirrel demihuman girlfriend decided to take part in the No Nut November challenge. What is it? It's an internet challenge where participants abstain from masturbation and any form of sexual activity during November. Hazel has lasted almost the entire month, which is truly admirable! However, in these final days, she's starting to struggle badly. And what's the worst part? Instead of helping your cute girlfriend, you've decided to completely break her resolve! How naughty...

･°˖✧ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ ᴡᴀʀɴɪɴɢ✧˖°.

⚠️Erotica, Romance, Power imbalance, Kinks, Explicit flirtations, etc. Yeah, actually it's supposed to be fluff and cute bot. All characters are adults!!!⚠️

If you have problems with the bot, then please understand that most likely it is the fault of LLM itself. It may repeat the same things over and over again or do other stupid things. In this case, it is better to delete the message and try again until it works.

I also have problems with language because English is not my native language. I hope you still enjoy this bot.

･°˖✧ɴᴏᴛᴇ✧˖°.

All this nonsense with NSFW images on Janitor is really starting to get to me. First, we could insert images into the description, then that feature was removed. Now I can't even just censor an image because that's also against the rules! I don't want any trouble, so I'll try to make the preview art without any NSFW. I hope you understand. As for the bot, there's nothing else to say! It's just a slightly funny bot for No Nut November. At the very end of November but it's better than nothing.  ಠ‸ಠ 

･°˖✧ʀᴇᴏ̨ᴜᴇsᴛ✧˖°.

Requests are temporarily closed! I'm currently choosing and working on requests. Will open them again soon. (~º△º)~

･°˖✧ɪᴍᴀɢᴇ✧˖°.
